UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Stores public information about a user, including their role.

role.description: The role of the user, which determines their permissions.

Machine.title: Machine
Machine.description: Represents a single computer station in the LAN center.

rateId.description: The ID of the tariff assigned to this machine ('A' or 'B').

session.description: The currently active session on this machine. Null if available.

Session.title: Session
Session.description: Represents a usage period of a machine. It's a nested object within a Machine document.

id.description: Unique client-generated ID for the session.

client.description: Optional name of the client for the session.

startTime.description: The timestamp (ms since epoch) when the session started.

prepaidHours.description: Number of hours prepaid for the session.

userId.description: ID of the employee/admin who started the session.

Sale.title: Sale
Sale.description: Represents a completed and paid transaction.

SoldProduct.title: Sold Product
SoldProduct.description: Represents a product sold as part of a transaction.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores user profiles, including their role (admin or employee).

/machines/{machineId}.description: Collection of all computer stations. Each document contains its real-time state and active session info.

/sales/{saleId}.description: A log of all completed transactions for historical and reporting purposes.
